channel.title: SEO without yoast
channel.description: Hello, I'm transferring a blog to frontity for a client for SEO I installed the head tags plugin and package, but the client said me he doesn't use yoast (or any SEO plugin) so I imagine that without this he should have everything manually in the frontity project, and that will over complicated things so is there another easy solution, or should I advise him to use yoast as it make things easier and automatic for everybody

item.title: SEO without yoast
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Using the Head Tags plugin is the equivalent of doing wp_head in a PHP theme. It gets all the default WordPress tags, even if no SEO plugin is installed.

Read full topic

item.title: SEO without yoast
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hello Alexandra!

How is he managing the head tags right now? In his “classic WordPress” installation I mean

Read full topic

item.title: SEO without yoast
item.dc:creator: alexaspalato
item.description:
Hello,
I’m transferring a blog to frontity for a client
for SEO I installed the head tags plugin and package, but the client said me he doesn’t use yoast (or any SEO plugin)
so I imagine that without this he should have everything manually in the frontity project, and that will over complicated things
so is there another easy solution, or should I advise him to use yoast as it make things easier and automatic for everybody

Read full topic
